title: GAD client feedback - April 2024 to March 2025
body: "At the Government Actuary’s Department (GAD) we partner with government and public sector clients by applying specialised actuarial knowledge in diverse areas. Our services include, but are not limited to, financial risk analysis, modelling, quality assurance and advisory support.  Feedback from our clients helps us to understand where we are being effective and valued, and to identify areas where we should improve. The majority of survey responses were highly positive. We are grateful to all our clients for the insightful and constructive feedback they have provided. "
